ddls:
CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week the holiday falls on */,
  "observance" TEXT /* Date of observance */,
  "observance_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy for observance (e.g., actual day, next Monday) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the holiday */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the holiday is a public holiday */,
  "is_fixed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the holiday date is fixed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the holiday was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the country was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holiday_countries" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holiday */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the holiday is a default holiday for the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for additional contact information */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_countries" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the country is the primary country for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holiday */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, pending, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_holiday_id FOREIGN KEY ("holiday_id") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holiday */,
  "observance_date" TEXT /* Date of observance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the observance (e.g., observed, not observed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observance_schedules_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observance_schedules_holiday_id FOREIGN KEY ("holiday_id") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holiday */,
  "observance_count" INTEGER /* Number of observances */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., observance pattern, trend) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_holiday_id FOREIGN KEY ("holiday_id") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id")
)
